summary: Integrated ADR 0285 onto main as repository version 0.177.121 after rebasing onto the latest realistic origin/main baseline at commit 2589093d44df851883360a9de929f2a610b4d4cb, which carried repository version 0.177.120 and platform version 0.130.77. The exact-candidate replay from committed source c6407a7c40399f5a36392c61037054179b23352b then completed cleanly: OpenBao recovery succeeded with the audit-log hardening in place, Keycloak and API gateway convergence stayed healthy, Paperless local and public publication checks passed including taxonomy reconciliation and smoke upload, and the post-apply restic backup recorded snapshot 0ea3c5176e2e123d8e56cc9e6b398e8a49d190d8e25f0c2587838850a7b3692c for config/ plus snapshot 64fa6fc807fb63c6c057c82e67a4abe7ca803b2662ab6548f75a3bb2983340f5 for versions/stack.yaml. Final targeted pytest, service completeness, repo validation, and make pre-push-gate all passed on the 0.177.121 candidate, while the remote pre-push lane truthfully preserved transient 502 Bad Gateway pulls of registry.example.com/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23 before the repo's unresolved-only local fallback reran packer-validate and tofu-validate successfully.

verification.check: Latest realistic mainline baseline and release cut
verification.observed: origin/main commit 2589093d44df851883360a9de929f2a610b4d4cb already carried repository version 0.177.120 and platform version 0.130.77. The protected mainline release write then produced repository version 0.177.121 in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-release-write-r1-0.177.121.txt.

uv run --with pytest python -m pytest tests/test_openbao_compose_env_helper.py tests/test_openbao_runtime_role.py tests/test_restic_config_backup.py tests/test_restic_config_backup_role.py tests/test_docker_runtime_role.py tests/test_paperless_runtime_role.py tests/test_paperless_playbook.py tests/test_paperless_sync.py tests/test_paperless_metadata.py passed with 72 tests in 0.95s in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-targeted-pytest-r3-0.177.121.txt.

verification.check: Service completeness and repo validation bundle
verification.observed: python3 scripts/validate_service_completeness.py --service paperless passed in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-validate-service-completeness-r1-0.177.121.txt, and ./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards data-models health-probes workstream-surfaces passed in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-validate-repo-r2-0.177.121.txt.

verification.check: Exact-main live apply and public verification
verification.observed: make live-apply-service service=paperless env=production completed with PLAY RECAP success for docker-runtime-lv3, localhost, nginx-lv3, and postgres-lv3 in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-live-apply-r1-0.177.121.txt. The same run verified Paperless local root and authenticated documents access, taxonomy reconciliation, shared NGINX publication, public token-authenticated API access, and the public smoke upload path.

The live-apply wrapper triggered restic config backup immediately after the replay, recording snapshot 0ea3c5176e2e123d8e56cc9e6b398e8a49d190d8e25f0c2587838850a7b3692c for /srv/platform_server/config and snapshot 64fa6fc807fb63c6c057c82e67a4abe7ca803b2662ab6548f75a3bb2983340f5 for /srv/platform_server/versions/stack.yaml.

verification.check: Final pre-push gate and local fallback
verification.observed: make pre-push-gate passed in receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-31-ws-0285-mainline-final-pre-push-gate-r2-0.177.121.txt. The remote builder truthfully recorded transient 502 Bad Gateway pulls for registry.example.com/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23, then run_gate_fallback reran only packer-validate and tofu-validate locally and merged the passing status back into .local/validation-gate/last-run.json.

notes: ADR 0285 first became true on platform version 0.130.75; this canonical mainline closeout advances the integrated platform truth to 0.130.78 without changing that first-live milestone.

The first final pre-push attempt correctly failed ansible-lint on task key order for the Keycloak and Paperless force-recreate blocks; the repo now carries the reorder fix and the second pre-push attempt passed cleanly.

The remote builder still intermittently returned 502 Bad Gateway while pulling registry.example.com/check-runner/infra:2026.03.23, but the repo's local fallback reran only the unresolved packer-validate and tofu-validate checks and preserved the final passing gate state.
